content:
🔗 **Patch Preview #1: Arachne's Key Terms!**🔗 

Hey @everyone!

You may have noticed that new Awakener names and skills often show up as MTL in-game: this happens because our term bases for volunteers are always going to be a little out of date by the time they reach you.
We've tried a few things to fix this. Most recently we released a massive 8,000-term master sheet across all 11 languages, but that turned out to be too unwieldy to work with and didn't get a lot of traction.

So we're trying something new:✏️  **Patch Previews.** 

The idea is simple: before each patch, we'll send out a focused list of just the key new terms (Awakener names, skills, cards) in CN and EN. 
You get a sneak peek at new content, and new characters get to launch with real translations (for the terms, at least) instead of MTL. 

**FIND ARACHNE'S KEY TERMS HERE: [[LINK]](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1NJ2puVVqUxCj7ISpZXr_lStRWneOulJw/edit?usp=drivesdk&ouid=109115841955076800121&rtpof=true&sd=true).**
To contribute, just fill in your translation in the respective cells in the sheet!

Again, please do not share the content in this sheet outside of this server in any way.

This patch is our first attempt at this, so the timing isn't perfect yet: these Chinese terms were only finalized about two working days before launch, which is just the reality of our current production pipeline. 
Turnaround time is very tight this time, and we'll be collecting whatever translations you give us to swap out the MTL in-game** by 04/17.** We appreciate anything you can give us, even if it's incomplete. 

*(For context: in-game assets like art are actually finished much earlier: we're often working on 2-3 patches simultaneously. But names and terms tend to get decided very late in the cycle. Skill descriptions in particular are basically always finalized THE day before launch. Hopefully as we keep doing these previews, terms will get locked in earlier! More of our original team is coming back, so things should get smoother from here.)*

You can continue working on this after the Arachne patch update happens; we'll just come back, collect terms, and swap out MTL in game again. We'll also upload a newer, up-to-date source sheet soon. You can expect more frequent source sheet updates from now on.

**⚠️ Before You Start**

**On length: **Please try to keep your translation to roughly 1.5x the visual character length of the Chinese text at most. Chinese is a very compact, high-context language, so some loss in translation is bound to happen and totally fine; fitting within the length limit and making sure Skill Names are readable takes priority over conveying every detail. :3

**On the English reference: **An official English translation of the terms is included for your reference. 

We've almost finished the EN translation of all new content now, which is usually impossible in the industry... because our devs are still actively finishing a patch the same day it ships. We're able to do it because I'm physically in the office with them around the clock, translating everything on the spot and editing said translation in real time whenever they make changes. 
While it's "official," no translation is ever perfect, and ours is no exception. We won't be able to apply any changes to the EN translation at this point in production due to time constraints, but we always appreciate your input and suggestions for future patches!
